title: Support Case Request
description: Schema describing the data expected in a support case request payload.

subject.description: Short summary of the support case.

request.description: Detailed message body sent by the customer.

communicationContext.description: Metadata describing how the customer contacted support.

channel.description: Channel of the incoming request (e.g., email).

conversationId.description: Identifier that ties the customer message to a conversation thread.

references.description: Key/value pairs that point to related reference data (e.g., contract IDs, previous conversation IDs).

value.description: Stored value for the reference key.
